items.title: Oil prices rise after Trump says Iranian ship seized
items.dek: Energy markets have seen wild swings since the US and Israel attacked Iran on 28 February.
items.body: Energy markets have seen wild swings since the US and Israel attacked Iran on 28 February.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Wemby tops Duncan with 35 in Spurs playoff debut
items.dek: Victor Wembanyama scored 35 points, the most by a Spurs player making his postseason debut, while leading a 111-98 win over the Trail Blazers in Game 1 of their
items.body: Victor Wembanyama scored 35 points, the most by a Spurs player making his postseason debut, while leading a 111-98 win over the Trail Blazers in Game 1 of their first-round series Sunday night.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: OK State lands top transfer Crooks from ISU
items.dek: Former Iowa State center Audi Crooks, No. 1 in ESPN's women's basketball transfer rankings, committed to Oklahoma State, she announced Sunday night.
items.body: Former Iowa State center Audi Crooks, No. 1 in ESPN's women's basketball transfer rankings, committed to Oklahoma State, she announced Sunday night.
